series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to, records created for Tourism and Travel campaigns, publications, surveys, marketing and advertising programs, records that document Ohio''s heritage, art, culture, activities, and destinations, reports and related files and information.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: period specified electronic format ; Electronic: in office area four (4) years NOTE: This series applies records that may possess enduring value and therefore require review by State Archives required retention period has elapsed. Records that do not possess this quality may be managed with an appropriate alternative schedule such as DEV-GEN-01, DEV-GEN-02, or DEV-GEN-03 as applicable. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject a litigation hold must be retained hold is lifted by Legal Office, regardless of whether specified retention period has elapsed
